news.t: Fidelity® Expands ETF Suite With Launch of Fidelity Preferred Securities & Income ETF

overview.description: The Fidelity Limited Term Bond ETF (FLTB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed, broad-based bond fund with a primary focus on investment-grade credits and a targeted average maturity between two and five years. The fund may hold below investment-grade also. FLTB was launched on Oct 6, 2014 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Fidelity® Expands ETF Suite With Launch of Fidelity Preferred Securities & Income ETF
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #ETF--Fidelity Investments launches new active fixed income ETF, Fidelity Preferred Securities & Income ETF.
